name: retro-terminal-profile-template
description: YAML-driven retro terminal GitHub profile template with local preview and GIF export

scripts.config: node scripts/run-sync-config.mjs && node scripts/generate-social-icons.mjs && node scripts/generate-config-docs.mjs
scripts.export: npm run config && node scripts/generate-static.mjs && node scripts/generate-teaser-gif.mjs && node scripts/sync-public-profile-assets.mjs
